channel.title: lastnpcalex — a mote in shadow
channel.description: A Mote in Shadow (EXU Book 1) ;; link page and announcements.

item.title: DE-LISTING FROM DRAFT2DIGITAL
item.description: D2D is shifting to annual fees, and most of my distribution there was free OverDrive copies. Winding down the account; existing reader libraries should be unaffected.
